title: Kannamma Lyrics Kaala
stanzas:
poovaaga en kadhal thenoorudho
thenaaga thenaaga vaanoorudho
kannamma kannamma
kannilae ennammaa

aagayam saayaama
 thoovaanam yaedhu
aaraama aaraama
kaayangal yaedhu

un kaadhal vaasam
en dhegam poosum
kaalangal poiyaanadhe

theeratha kaadhal
theeyaga modha
dhoorangal madai maarumo

vaan paarthu yaengum
siru pullin dhaagam
kaanalgal niraivetrumo

neerindri meenum
saerundu vaazhum
vazhvingu vaazhvaagumo

aagayam saayaama
thoovaanam yaedhu
aaraama aaraama
kaayangal yaedhu

meettadha veenai
tharukindra raagam
ketkaadhu poongaandhale

oottaadha thaayin
kanakindra paal pol
en kaadhal kidakindradhe

kayangal aatrum
thalaikodhi thetrum
kalangal kaikoodudhe

thoduvaanam indru
neduvaanam aagi
thodum neram
tholaivaakudhe

aagayam saayaama
thoovaanam yaedhu
aaraama aaraama
kaayangal yaedhu
tamilStanzas:
பூவாக என் காதல் தேனுருதோ
தேனாக தேனாக வானுறுதோ

ஆகாயம் சாயாம தூவானம் ஏது
ஆறாம ஆறாம காயங்கள் ஏது

உன் காதல் வாசம்
என் தேகம் பூசும்
காலங்கள் பொய்யானதே

தீராத காதல்
தீயாக மோத
தூரங்கள் மடை மாறுமோ

வான் பார்த்து ஏங்கும்
சிறு புல்லின் தாகம்
கானல்கள் நிறைவேற்றுமோ

நீரின்றி மீனும்
சேறுண்டு  வாழும்
வாழ்விக்கு வாழ்வாகுமோ

ஆகாயம் சாயாம தூவானம் ஏது
ஆறாம ஆறாம காயங்கள் ஏது

மீட்டதா வீணை
தருகின்ற ராகம்
கேட்காது பூங்காந்தலே

ஊட்டாத தாயின்
கனுக்கின்ற பால் போல்
என் காதல் கிடக்கிறதே

காயங்கல் ஆற்றும்
தலைகோதி தேற்றும்
காலங்கள் கைகூடுதே

தொடுவானம் இன்று
நெடுவானாம் ஆகி
தொடும் நேரம்
தொலைவாகுதே

ஆகாயம் சாயாம தூவானம் ஏது
ஆறாம ஆறாம காயங்கள் ஏது

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kannamma?

The song Kannamma is a romantic melody that expresses deep love and affection.

Who are the singers of Kannamma?

The song is sung by Dhee and Pradeep.

Who composed the music for Kaala?

The music for Kaala was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

What is the significance of the song in the movie Kaala?

The song captures the romantic moments and emotional depth between the characters in the film.

When was the song Kannamma released?

The song was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannamma from the movie Kaala is a beautiful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Dhee and Pradeep, the song is enriched with poetic lyrics by Uma Devi, which convey deep emotions and affection. Santhosh Narayanan's soothing composition adds a layer of tranquility, making it perfect for moments of reflection and romance. In the movie, the song underscores the intimate connection between the characters, enhancing the narrative with its emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannamma from the movie Kaala, where Dhee and Pradeep's soulful voices blend seamlessly with Santhosh Narayanan's soothing composition. This romantic track captures the essence of love with its poetic lyrics by Uma Devi. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable musical journey.
stanzaMeanings: Does my love flow like honey from a flower? Does it rise like the sky, Kannamma? What is it in my eyes?
Does the sky not darken? Which clouds are endless? Which fruits are endless?
Kannamma, Kannamma, what is it in my eyes?
Your love's fragrance covers my body, but the times are false.
Will the unending love burn like fire? Will the distances change?
Looking at the sky, the thirst of a small bird, will mirages ever fulfill it?
Can a life without water be called a life?
Kannamma, Kannamma, what is it in my eyes?
Does the sky not darken? Which clouds are endless? Which fruits are endless?
The tune from the untouched instrument is not heard in the garden.
Like the milk from a mother who doesn't feed, my love lies there.
The hands that play, the forehead that sweats, the games are within reach.
The sky that touches today becomes a distant sky, and the time to touch fades away.
Kannamma, Kannamma, what is it in my eyes?
Does the sky not darken? Which clouds are endless? Which fruits are endless?
Kannamma, Kannamma, what is it in my eyes?
